generate_dashboard.name: Generate Dashboard
generate_dashboard.description: Generates ready-to-use Lovelace YAML for your cable modem dashboard. Copy the output and paste it into a Manual card.

include_status_card.name: Status Card
include_status_card.description: Modem status, uptime, channel counts, and restart button.

include_downstream_power.name: Downstream Power Graph
include_downstream_power.description: Power levels for all downstream channels.

include_downstream_snr.name: Downstream SNR Graph
include_downstream_snr.description: Signal-to-noise ratio for all downstream channels.

include_upstream_power.name: Upstream Power Graph
include_upstream_power.description: Power levels for all upstream channels.

include_errors.name: Error Graphs
include_errors.description: Corrected and uncorrected error counts (7-day view).

include_latency.name: Latency Graph
include_latency.description: Ping and HTTP response times (6-hour view).

graph_hours.name: Graph History (hours)
graph_hours.description: Hours of history for power/SNR graphs (errors and latency use fixed timeframes).

short_titles.name: Use Short Titles
short_titles.description: Short: 'DS Power (dBmV)' vs Long: 'Downstream Power Levels (dBmV)'.

user.title: Cable Modem Monitor
user.description: Connect to your cable modem. Models marked * are unverified.

data_description.modem_choice: Select your modem model. Use 'Unknown Modem (Fallback Mode)' if not listed.
data_description.entity_prefix: Adds model or IP to entity IDs to avoid conflicts with multiple modems.

auth_type.title: Authentication Type
auth_type.description:
Your {modem_name} has multiple firmware variants with different authentication.
Select the type that matches your modem:

data_description.auth_type:
No Auth: Data pages load without login
Form Login: Login page with username/password
URL Token: Uses URL-based session tokens

error.invalid_auth:
Authentication failed - modem returned login page.

Please verify:
1. Username is correct (typically 'admin', check modem label)
2. Password is correct (check modem label)
3. Credentials have not been changed from defaults

Try logging into the modem manually at https://192.168.100.1 to verify credentials work.
error.network_unreachable:
Cannot reach modem - network connectivity issue.

Please check:
1. Network connection - Are you on the correct WiFi network?
2. Guest WiFi - Guest networks often block access to local devices
3. VPN - Disconnect any active VPN connections
4. IP address - Verify the modem's IP (typically 192.168.100.1)
5. Modem web interface - Ensure it's enabled and accessible
6. Slow response - Some modems take a few seconds to wake up; try submitting again

Try accessing the modem directly in your browser to verify connectivity.
error.cannot_connect:
Failed to connect to the modem.

Please verify:
1. IP address is correct (typically 192.168.100.1)
2. If modem requires authentication, enter username/password
3. Modem's web interface is accessible from Home Assistant's network

If your modem is not supported, select 'Unknown Modem (Fallback Mode)' to enable basic monitoring and HTML capture.
error.unsupported_modem:
Auto-detection could not identify your modem model.

To proceed:
1. Select 'Unknown Modem (Fallback Mode)' from the dropdown below
2. This enables basic connectivity monitoring (ping/HTTP latency)
3. After installation, click 'Capture HTML' button
4. Download diagnostics and share with developers to add full support
error.invalid_input: Invalid input provided. Please check the values and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Cable Modem Settings
init.description: Update connection details and polling intervals.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll modem data. Default 10 minutes. Set to 00:00:00 to disable automatic polling (manual only via Update button).
data_description.health_check_interval: How often to check modem reachability. Default 30 seconds. Set to 00:00:00 to disable health checks.

error.network_unreachable: Cannot reach modem. Check IP address and network connectivity.
error.cannot_connect: Modem not responding. Check IP address and protocol.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check username and password.
error.parse_failed: Connected but couldn't read modem data.
